subject: Databases
title: Materialized Views
description: Learn Materialized Views in one minute.

hook.text: A dashboard query joins five tables and aggregates millions of rows. It takes 8 seconds. Every. Single. Load.

buildup.text: A materialized view stores the query result. The dashboard reads the cached result instead of recomputing.

discovery.text: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW dashboard_data AS SELECT ... REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW dashboard_data to update it.

twist.text: The data is stale between refreshes. REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY updates without blocking reads.

climax.text: Schedule refreshes: every 5 minutes, every hour, or after data loads. Match freshness to business needs.

punchline.text: Materialized views: pre-computed results. Fast reads, controlled staleness.

quiz.question: What is the trade-off of using materialized views?
options: Reads are very fast but data can be stale between refreshes
